into_the_wild.name: Osho Teerth Park
into_the_wild.description: A serene 12-acre Zen garden featuring beautiful light filtering through trees (komorebi effect). Perfect for peaceful morning walks with stunning natural interplay of sunlight and canopy.

into_the_wild.name: Sambhaji Udyan
into_the_wild.description: A public garden and park located on JM Road in Pune. A local green space for relaxation and outdoor activities.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Osho Teerth Park - Morning Light Shots
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic location for photography enthusiasts capturing the komorebi effect with sunrise rays piercing through the tree canopy. Best visited early morning for stunning photo opportunities.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Kharadi Viewpoint
gram_worthy_spots.description: A scenic spot in Kharadi offering beautiful landscape views that showcase seasonal changes dramatically, ideal for nature and landscape photography.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Keshav Nagar
off_the_beaten_path.description: A local residential area in Pune known for its community spirit and friendly neighborhood vibes, reflecting the helpful nature of locals.
